testCases.title: E2E: Multi-Section Configuration Preserved in Cart
testCases.notes: Navigated to Laptop PDP via product ID. Selected 32GB RAM ($250) and 1TB SSD ($150). Price correctly showed $1,399.00 ($999+$250+$150). Added to cart at qty=1. Cart showed line item at $1,399.00. Expanded Components list confirmed: 1) AGENT-TEST-Config-Laptop-32GB-20260324, 2) AGENT-TEST-Config-Laptop-1TB-20260324. Both selections preserved correctly.

testCases.title: E2E: Sale Price and Strikethrough List Price on Configurable Product
testCases.notes: Sale Bike PDP loaded. Base price: $300 list (struck through) / $250 sale. -17% badge visible. Standard Handlebar: sale=$290 ($250+$40), list=$350 ($300+$50) - CORRECT. Drop Bar: sale=$330 ($250+$80), list=$400 ($300+$100) - CORRECT. Sale price math uses sale prices for active total, not list prices.

testCases.title: E2E: Out-of-Stock Option Disabled and Required Section Blocks Purchase When All Options OOS
testCases.notes: OOS Bike PDP loaded. Frame Color section (Required) shows 4 options: Red ($0), Blue ($0), Silver ($25), Limited Edition Black ($50 qty=0 OOS). FINDING: The OOS option (Limited Edition Black) is NOT disabled/greyed out - its radio button has no [disabled] attribute and shows [cursor=pointer], making it selectable. All 4 options appear identically interactive with no visual differentiation for OOS status. Silver selection at $525.00 and add-to-cart worked correctly for in-stock option.
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] Out-of-stock option (Limited Edition Black qty=0) visible but not selectable - FAILED: option IS selectable, radio not disabled

testCases.title: E2E: Create Product with Required Text Section and Verify Text Input on Storefront
testCases.notes: Engraved Ring PDP loaded. Configure the parameters widget visible with Engraving Text section marked Required (*). Text input empty by default. Typed 'Happy Birthday' - text accepted, price remained $150.00 (text does not affect price). Section header updated to show text value. Added to cart at qty=1. Cart showed line item at $150.00 with Components list: '1. Selected text: Happy Birthday'. Text preserved through add-to-cart.

testCases.title: E2E: Required Text Section Blocks Add-to-Cart When Field Is Empty
testCases.notes: On Engraved Ring PDP with empty text field, clicking increase qty (add to cart) was blocked. Section header changed to 'Engraving Text * Section is required'. Notification appeared: 'Sorry, this product cannot be added to cart. Check your product configuration'. Cart badge remained at 1 (no item added). After typing 'With Love' and clicking add-to-cart again, item added successfully. Cart showed 'Selected text: With Love' in Components list.

testCases.title: E2E: Create Product with Optional Text Section and Verify Empty and Filled Scenarios
testCases.notes: Gift Box PDP loaded. Gift Message section marked Optional with 'Personalize your selection further (optional)' text. Has radio options: Custom option (text input) and No selection (None, default checked). SCENARIO A: With None selected (empty), added to cart at qty=1 - no validation error, item added at $50.00. SCENARIO B: Selected Custom option radio, typed 'Congratulations!', added to cart - item added at $50.00. Cart showed 'Selected text: Congratulations!' in Components list for filled scenario. Both scenarios at $50.00.

testCases.title: Configuration Widget State After Page Refresh
testCases.notes: Used existing Bike with options product. PDP loaded with Configure the parameters widget showing 3 sections: Text (optional), Test (optional), Produts * (required). Selected Foam mattress in Produts section. Pressed F5 to refresh page. After refresh: widget rendered correctly, all 3 sections visible, Foam mattress selection was RETAINED (radio checked), price consistent at $350.00, widget fully interactive with clickable options. No JS errors related to widget re-render.

bugs.title: Out-of-Stock configuration option (qty=0) is NOT disabled on storefront - user can select OOS option
bugs.failedAssertion: [DOM] Out-of-stock option (Limited Edition Black qty=0) visible but not selectable
bugs.stepsToReproduce:
1. Navigate to PDP for AGENT-TEST-Config-OOS-Bike-20260324 (product ID: 14bf1ca4-d1ff-4395-8d15-e8fc65dddc43)
2. Observe Frame Color section (Required) with 4 options
3. Note Limited Edition Black option ($50.00, qty=0 in admin)
4. Observe that the radio button for Limited Edition Black is NOT disabled
5. It has cursor=pointer and can be clicked/selected
6. No visual differentiation (greyed out, strikethrough, 'Out of Stock' label) between OOS and in-stock options
bugs.expected: Limited Edition Black (qty=0) should be visually disabled/greyed out with an out-of-stock indicator. The radio button should have [disabled] attribute and not be selectable.
bugs.actual: All 4 radio buttons appear identically interactive. Limited Edition Black has no [disabled] attribute, shows cursor=pointer, and is currently the default selected option. No visual differentiation for OOS status.
